name: Broadway Park
description: Broadway Park is a place to play pickleball in Marseilles, IL. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Lincoln-Douglas Park
description: Lincoln-Douglas Park is a place to play pickleball in Ottawa, IL. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Ottawa YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Ottawa YMCA in Ottawa, IL! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Peck Park
description: Peck Park is a place to play pickleball in Ottawa, IL. There are 4 outdoor asphalt and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Peru YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Peru YMCA in Peru, IL! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Streator YMCA
description: Streator YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Streator, IL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Thornton Park
description: Thornton Park is a place to play pickleball in Ottawa, IL. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Washington Park
description: Come play pickleball at Washington Park in Peru, IL! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.
